name: ProgramEncounter.associateChild
use_when: Internal mutation — associates child approval statuses to the parent program encounter during sync.

name: ProgramEncounter.cloneForEdit
use_when: Internal mutation — clones the encounter for edit operations, preserving program enrolment reference.

name: ProgramEncounter.createEmptyInstance
use_when: Internal initialization — creates a blank program encounter instance for new records.

name: ProgramEncounter.createScheduled
use_when: Internal mutation — instantiates a scheduled program encounter for a given type and enrolment.

name: ProgramEncounter.findLatestObservationInEntireEnrolment
use_when: Returns the most recent observation matching a concept across all encounters in the enrolment.

name: ProgramEncounter.findObservationInEntireEnrolment
use_when: Returns any observation matching a concept across all encounters in the program enrolment.

name: ProgramEncounter.fromResource
use_when: Internal deserialization — reconstructs a program encounter from synced resource data.

name: ProgramEncounter.getAllScheduledVisits
use_when: Returns all scheduled visits within the program enrolment relative to this encounter.

name: ProgramEncounter.getEncounterDateValues
use_when: Returns an object containing actual, scheduled, and maximum encounter date values.

name: ProgramEncounter.getName
use_when: Internal framework — returns the hardcoded entity type name "ProgramEncounter".

name: ProgramEncounter.getSchemaName
use_when: Internal framework — returns the Realm schema name for program encounters.

name: ProgramEncounter.individual
use_when: Returns the individual subject enrolled in the program for this encounter.

name: ProgramEncounter.observationExistsInEntireEnrolment
use_when: Returns true if a concept has been observed anywhere in the program enrolment.

name: ProgramEncounter.programEnrolment
use_when: Returns the associated program enrolment object containing this encounter.

name: ProgramEncounter.setLatestEntityApprovalStatus
use_when: Internal mutation — sets the most recent approval status record for this encounter.

name: ProgramEncounter.toJSON
use_when: Internal serialization — converts the encounter to a JSON representation for transport.

name: ProgramEncounter.toResource
use_when: Internal serialization — converts the encounter to a sync-ready resource object.

name: ProgramEncounter.validate
use_when: Returns validation errors if encounter date falls outside enrolment window or is in future.
